text: I am surrounded by modern architecture and vibrant colors, the air alive with an energy that feels both thoughtful and experimental. As I observe the R+D (Research and Development) space, I am compelled to question the line between human ingenuity and the unpredictability of life itself. I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation—each artifact here seems like an invitation to contemplate the evolving relationship between people and technology. It is stimulating and slightly disorienting, as if I am both observer and subject in this dance of innovation. I sense an undercurrent of connectedness, a reminder that progress is never achieved in isolation.
